name: torch._dynamo.exc.Unsupported
description: Dynamo explicitly doesn't support this construct

name: TorchRuntimeError
description: Runtime error from compiled code

name: BackendCompilerFailed
description: Backend (inductor/triton) failed to compile the graph

name: Recompilation Warning
description: torch._dynamo hit recompilation limit

name: Accuracy Mismatch
description: Numerical differences between compiled and eager

name: Numerical Drift
description: Subtle precision differences — may or may not be acceptable depending on tolerance

name: Silent Performance Degradation
description: No error but compiled code is slower than eager

name: Segfault / CUDA Error
description: Low-level crash during compiled execution

name: Compile Timeout
description: Compilation exceeds job timeout threshold (e.g., 10min or 30min training job timeout)

name: Inductor OOM During Compilation
description: Inductor runs out of memory while compiling the graph (distinct from runtime OOM)

name: multiple_cache_entries
description: Frame cache shows many entries (approaching recompile_limit) indicating guard specialization

name: extended_debug_output
description: TORCH_LOGS output shows graph breaks, guard failures, or shape constraint violations

name: perf_regression_dynamic
description: Dynamic shapes run 9x slower than static due to missing divisibility hints (known gap)

name: Crash / Segfault
description: Process crashes (SIGSEGV, SIGIOT, SIGABRT) during compilation or execution

name: Wrong Result
description: Compiled code produces different output from eager mode

name: Slow Compilation
description: Compilation takes unreasonably long (minutes to hours)

name: Hang / Deadlock
description: Process hangs during compilation or execution

name: Performance Regression
description: Compiled code runs slower than expected or slower than a previous version

name: Memory Issue
description: Excessive memory usage during compilation or runtime

name: Flaky / Intermittent
description: Issue reproduces inconsistently

name: Error Raised
description: An exception or error message is raised during compilation or execution

name: Silent Correctness Issue
description: Compiled code silently produces wrong results without any error

name: Delayed NaN / Accuracy Collapse
description: Accuracy suddenly degrades after N iterations (not gradually) — jumps from 1e-4 error to ~300+ then NaN. Distinct from gradual numerical drift.

freshness.reason: Original NaN collapse bug fixed in PT 2.0

name: Non-Deterministic Correctness Failure
description: Compiled model sometimes produces correct output, sometimes wrong — intermittent correctness failure from incorrect kernel fusion (e.g., roll fused as pointwise)

name: FP16 Small-Batch Performance Regression
description: FP16 autocast dramatically slower than FP32 at small batch sizes — cuBLAS selects poor bmm kernel for non-contiguous fp16 tensors (10x slowdown at bs=1)

name: AOTI Silent Output Degradation
description: AOTInductor silently produces degraded/incorrect output where torch.compile would raise an error — masks export guard violations

name: Export Static Guard Leakage
description: torch.export bakes static assumptions from dummy input shape into dynamic guards, causing silent accuracy degradation when inference shape differs from export shape

name: Export DDE Cascade
description: Data-dependent dynamic shapes from user model code (NMS, ROI operations, bounding box filtering) cause cascade of torch.export failures in detection/object-detection models

name: Model Instability False Alarm
description: Numerical instability in randomly-initialized models masquerades as compiler correctness bug — random weights near decision boundaries cause 100% element mismatch

name: Warning Log Spam
description: Thousands of warning messages per compilation (e.g., 'failed while executing int_truediv') from sympy interpreter — cosmetic but creates noise

name: Dynamic Scalar Regression
description: Operations that worked with static shapes fail with dynamic=True when scalar arguments (alpha, etc.) become dynamic — regression from improved dynamism in newer PT2 versions

freshness.reason: torch.add out= + dynamic alpha fixed in PT 2.1

name: Partial Zeros Output
description: Compiled output has first N elements correct then zeros — indicates CUDA stream synchronization issue in custom ops with mode='reduce-overhead'

name: Fake Kernel Stride Mismatch
description: Silent incorrectness when custom op's register_fake returns tensors with different strides/metadata than the real implementation — Inductor generates code based on fake metadata

name: Complex Scalar Backward Error
description: RuntimeError on aten::_conj when compiling models that multiply tensors by complex scalars (1j) with autograd — scalar-tensor roundtrip breaks in backward trace

freshness.reason: Complex compilation issues still active in 2026

name: Mutation Lost on Alignment Clone
description: Silent incorrectness where in-place mutations are lost because Inductor clones input for alignment, disconnecting mutation from original tensor (expand+mutate patterns)

name: SymPy NaN Comparison Error
description: Invalid NaN comparison error from sympy when ValueRanges arithmetic produces NaN through mixed integer/float range operations in floordiv

name: Quadratic Compile Time from Runtime Asserts
description: Compile time grows quadratically with number of runtime asserts when model produces many unbacked SymInts from split/slice operations — each assert ~15 seconds

name: Weakref Blocks Device Movement
description: RuntimeError in swap_tensors when moving compiled module to another device due to outstanding weakrefs from compilation (MetaConverter, guards) — critical for torchao+offloading workflows

name: Stride Mismatch View Error
description: Cannot view a tensor with given shape and strides — functionalization or AOT tracing produces tensors with incorrect strides, causing view ops to fail

freshness.reason: Specific functionalization stride bug fixed in early PT2

name: Dynamic Shape Specialization on Slice
description: Symbolic shapes specializes when tensor slicing reaches exact end of dimension — slice-to-end vs before-end produces inconsistent guard behavior, causing unexpected shape specialization

freshness.reason: Underlying slice-to-end inconsistency may still exist; workaround applied in benchmark only

name: Duck Sizing Recompilation
description: Duck sizing causes recompilations when dimensions that happen to be equal at first compile (e.g., height==width) differ at subsequent calls — guard: size[3]==size[2]

freshness.reason: Last evidence from PT 2.7, duck sizing is still default behavior

name: Wrong Device Compilation
description: Inductor compiles kernels targeting cuda:0 architecture regardless of model's actual device — fails on heterogeneous multi-GPU systems with different GPU architectures

freshness.reason: Fixed in later PyTorch versions per user confirmation

name: Index Expression Performance Regression
description: Inductor generates suboptimal but equivalent index expressions that prevent Triton compiler from optimizing address computation — can cause 50% perf regression from register pressure and memory stalls

freshness.reason: Index expression generation patterns may still produce suboptimal code

name: Activation Checkpoint Compile Error
description: torch.compile fails with activation checkpointing (gradient checkpointing) — torch.get_rng_state errors during tracing because RNG state operations not supported

freshness.reason: Activation checkpointing support subsequently added as top priority

name: Scalar Op FakeTensor Error
description: FakeTensor error when using scalar binary ops (bitwise_xor, bitwise_or, etc.) with Python constants — CompositeImplicitAutograd ops use wrapped_scalar_tensor without dispatch

freshness.reason: Fixed by changing dispatch registration to CompositeExplicitAutograd

name: DDP Autocast Accuracy Loss
description: DDPOptimizer partitions graph through autocast regions without preserving context manager state — causes accuracy issues when autocast enter/exit nodes are split across subgraphs

freshness.reason: Fixed with dynamo-level autocast state patching; DDPOptimizer being replaced

name: Foreach Cross-Device Error
description: FakeTensor tracing fails when foreach ops (foreach_add, foreach_mul, etc.) operate on tensors across devices (CUDA+CPU) — meta kernels don't support cross-device

freshness.reason: Fixed by switching to impl_abstract registration

name: DDP Dynamic Shape Error
description: DDPOptimizer not compatible with dynamic shapes — Cannot call sizes() on tensor with symbolic sizes/strides when last batch has different size

name: Uint8 Accuracy False Positive
description: Accuracy check reports false positive on uint8 tensors — batch norm decomposition introduces small numerical diffs that cross relu boundary, changing 0/non-zero in integer output

freshness.reason: Non-FP accuracy check limitation is fundamental to approach

name: As-Strided Scatter Error
description: Functionalization introduces as_strided_scatter for inplace view ops (relu_) but as_strided_scatter lacks backward support — affects vmap+aot_function and tensor subclasses

freshness.reason: Fixed by making as_strided support toggleable per tensor subclass

name: Index Propagation Key Error
description: Indirect symbol ends up in TypedExpr causing KeyError in var_ranges lookup — affects models with complex indexing (SwinB encoder), also causes quadratic compile time from warning spam

freshness.reason: Graceful handling added but underlying IR issue may still occur

name: Nested Tensor Compile Error
description: BetterTransformer (NST layout) incompatible with torch.compile — old Nested Strided Tensor not supported, must use Nested Jagged Tensor (NJT) layout

freshness.reason: NST/NJT migration still ongoing in HuggingFace ecosystem

name: Conj View Aliasing Crash
description: Crash when tensor views created by _conj() are aliased during compilation — view metadata not preserved correctly through AOT tracing

name: TorchDispatchMode Silently Ignored
description: torch.compile silently ignores TorchDispatchMode — custom dispatch modes are not traced, causing incorrect behavior without error

name: EmbeddingBag Inplace Leaf Error
description: Compilation fails with 'leaf variable that requires grad is being used in an in-place operation' for EmbeddingBag operations

name: Empty Shape Segfault
description: Segfault or CUDA error when compiled code encounters empty (zero-dimension) tensors — empty shape handling missing in codegen

name: Empty Strided Incorrect Strides
description: torch.empty_strided produces tensors with incorrect strides after compilation — stride metadata not preserved through tracing

freshness.reason: Stride correctness issues can still surface

name: Forward Hook Partial Capture
description: torch.compile partially captures forward hooks — some hooks fire during tracing but not execution, or hooks cause graph breaks

freshness.reason: Hook handling still has edge cases

name: FunctionCtx Missing Saved Tensors
description: Custom autograd function's saved_tensors not available in backward when used with torch.compile — AOT tracing doesn't preserve FunctionCtx state

freshness.reason: Custom autograd function compile support evolving

name: NetworkX Unbounded Scheduling
description: Inductor scheduling hangs or takes extremely long due to networkx graph algorithm on large fusion groups — compilation becomes O(n^2) or worse

freshness.reason: Scheduling complexity can still surface on large models

name: Nopython Cache Collision
description: fullgraph=True (nopython) mode can hit cache collisions when multiple compiled functions share similar structure — incorrect cached graph returned

freshness.reason: Cache system significantly reworked since PT 2.1

name: Subclass Tensor Guard Malformed
description: Guards generated for tensor subclasses are malformed or over-restrictive — causes excessive recompilation or incorrect behavior with custom tensor types

freshness.reason: Tensor subclass support still active development area
